what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that links attachment att-c782090d to board item item-1ee74515 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML front matter and no body content.
The id in the filename matches the id field in the front matter.
The attachment_type is 'board_items' and the target is the URI 'board://item-1ee74515'.
The added timestamp uses an ISO 8601 format with an explicit UTC offset.
standouts: The target is a board:// URI rather than a file path or web URL.
The file is purely a typed linkage record with no attached payload or description.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with a stable identifier matching the filename.
Represents a relationship through an attachment_type field and a target URI.
Records creation time as an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
concerns: The file provides no explanation of why the attachment exists or what it contains.
The semantics of the board:// URI scheme are not defined here.
No author or source message is recorded.
notes: A lightweight, timestamped linkage record connecting a channel attachment to a specific board item.
questions: What resource does the board://item-1ee74515 URI resolve to?
What artifact or content is represented by attachment att-c782090d?
Is there a schema that constrains attachment_type values and target URI schemes?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears designed to index an attachment-to-board-item association, and its content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It seems intended to register that a particular board item has an associated attachment in the dragnet-development channel, supporting cross-referencing between board items and channel artifacts.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped attachment-board-item association that a fused system can use to correlate channel attachments with board entries.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking attachment att-c782090d to board item item-1ee74515 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item has a corresponding channel attachment for later lookup and cross-reference.
